mapper.select: /* dvcChgMapper.getAsgnTrgtPrsnList */ SELECT A.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST A WHERE A.GRP_ID = 'VOC0018' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y'

/* dvcChgMapper.getDvcChgPsblCheck */
WITH CNTR AS ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , D.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUB_STATUS , A.SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , A.ICC_ID , ( -- 기변이력이 2건 이상인 경우 처리를 위하여 MAX 사용 SELECT DISTINCT MAX(DECODE(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 'none', SUBSTR(X.APP_START_DD, 1, 8), SUBSTR(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 1, 8)) || NVL(X.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '0')) OVER (PARTITION BY X.CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST Y WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND X.MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND X.EVNT_TRTM_NO = Y.EVNT_TRTM_NO AND Y.APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231000000' UNION -- 기변개발전 우수기변 대상 SELECT DECODE(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 'none', MIN(SUBSTR(X.APP_START_DD, 1, 8)), SUBSTR(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 1, 8)) || MAX(X.ENGG_MNTH_CNT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND X.EVNT_CD IN ('UPD','UAD') AND X.MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = X.CONTRACT_NUM AND APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231000000' ) GROUP BY X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, X.CONTRACT_NUM UNION -- 일반적인 경우 SELECT DISTINCT X.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE || NVL(Y.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '0') FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO X , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO Y WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND Y.MODEL_CHN_CD <> '01' AND Y.ENGG_MNTH_CNT IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD = 'SIM' AND GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD = 'A' AND APP_END_DATE = '99991231000000' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD IN ('UPD', 'UAD') AND MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = X.CONTRACT_NUM AND APPL_END_DTTM LIKE '99991231%' ) ) AS ENGG_INFO , DECODE(B.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS HIST_YN , DECODE(B.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, '', SUBSTR(MAX(B.APPL_STRT_DTTM) OVER(PARTITION BY B.APPL_STRT_DTTM), 1, 8)) AS DVC_CHG_DT , C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT AS DVC_ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST B , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO C , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO D WHERE A.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY(+) IS NOT NULL AND ( B.APPL_END_DTTM(+) = '99991231000000' OR TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.APPL_END_DTTM(+), 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.APPL_STRT_DTTM(+), 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') >= 15 ) AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.EVNT_TRTM_NO = C.EVNT_TRTM_NO(+) AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = D.CUSTOMER_ID AND REPLACE(D.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME, ' ', '') = REPLACE(UPPER(#{custNm}), ' ', '') AND CASE WHEN D.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' AND D.CUST_IDNT_NO_IND_CD IN ('01','05') THEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(D.CUSTOMER_SSN), 1, 6) ELSE D.TAX_ID END = #{idntNum} AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} ORDER BY B.APPL_STRT_DTTM DESC ) SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUB_STATUS , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', A.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS_NM , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'S', A.SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE, '') AS SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'S', C.CD_DSC, '') AS SUB_STATUS_RSN_NM , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'S', NVL(C.ETC1, 'N'), '') AS LOST_YN , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , A.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.ENGG_INFO , CASE WHEN A.HIST_YN = 'Y' AND SYSDATE - TO_DATE(A.DVC_CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DVC_CHG_YN , CASE WHEN A.HIST_YN = 'Y' AND SYSDATE - TO_DATE(A.DVC_CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 THEN '불가' ELSE '가능' END AS DVC_CHG_NM , CASE WHEN A.HIST_YN = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN SYSDATE - TO_DATE(A.DVC_CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 THEN '기변불가' WHEN ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.DVC_CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(NVL(A.DVC_ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0))) - SYSDATE <= TO_NUMBER(B.CD_VAL) THEN 'HDN3' ELSE 'HCN3' END ELSE CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO, 9) = 0 THEN 'HCN3' WHEN ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO, 9))) - SYSDATE <= TO_NUMBER(B.CD_VAL) THEN 'HDN3' ELSE 'HCN3' END END DVC_CHG_TP , CASE WHEN A.HIST_YN = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN SYSDATE - TO_DATE(A.DVC_CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 THEN '기변불가' WHEN ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.DVC_CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(NVL(A.DVC_ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0))) - SYSDATE <= TO_NUMBER(B.CD_VAL) THEN '우수기변' ELSE '일반기변' END ELSE CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO, 9) = 0 THEN '일반기변' WHEN ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO, 9))) - SYSDATE <= TO_NUMBER(B.CD_VAL) THEN '우수기변' ELSE '일반기변' END END DVC_CHG_TP_NM , A.ICC_ID , SUBSTR(A.SUBSCRIBER_NO, 1, 3) AS CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , SUBSTR(A.SUBSCRIBER_NO, 4, 4) AS CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , SUBSTR(A.SUBSCRIBER_NO, 8, 4) AS CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , FN_GET_UNPD_AMNT(A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS UNPD_AMNT FROM CNTR A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE B.GRP_ID = 'RCP0028' AND B.ETC1 = '10' AND A.SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE = C.CD_VAL(+) AND C.GRP_ID(+) = 'MSP0004' AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
/* dvcChgMapper.insertVocMgmtMst */ INSERT INTO MSP_VOC_MGMT_MST ( RCP_ID , CNSL_MST_CD , CNSL_MID_CD , CNSL_DTL_CD , CUST_REL , CUST_YN , REQ_CUST_NM , REQ_TEL_NUM , TEL_NUM , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , CNSL_STAT , REQ_ORGN_ID , REQR_ID , REQ_DTTM , PROC_ORGN_ID , PROCR_ID , PROC_DTTM
, CMPL_ORGN_ID , CMPLR_ID , CMPL_DTTM , PROC_MM
, REQ_CNTT , RES_CNTT ) SELECT #{vocRcpId} , #{cnslMstCd} , #{cnslMidCd} , #{cnslDtlCd} , '10' , '1' , B.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.CUSTOMER_ID , A.CONTRACT_NUM , #{cnslStatCd} , #{userOrgnId} , #{userId} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , #{userOrgnId} , #{userId} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
, #{userOrgnId} , #{userId} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , 0
, ' ' , ' ' FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_TRGT_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B WHERE A.CRT_YM = #{crtYm} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID
mapper.select: /* dvcChgMapper.getUsimPrice */ SELECT ETC2 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0053' AND CD_VAL = #{operType} || (SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = #{socCode} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN APPL_STRT_DT AND APPL_END_DT)
